help:
HomeVault bot — just chat, no slash commands needed:
• “spent 50 on groceries” or “100 water bill” — log an expense
• “what's overdue?” — items needing attention
• “how's this month?” — dashboard at a glance
• “what's upcoming?” — events & due dates
• “mark exp-7 paid” — mark an expense paid

Classic commands still work:
/overdue · /dashboard · /upcoming · /addexpense <amount> <name> · /paid <id> · /link <code>
linkInvalid: That link code is invalid or expired.
notLinked: Your chat isn't linked yet. Open HomeVault → Settings → Integrations, create a Telegram link code, and send: /link <code>
noExpenseId: That bill couldn't be found — it may already be paid.
menuTitle:
What would you like to do?
(or just type, e.g. “50 groceries”)
notUnderstood: I didn't catch that. Pick an option below — or type something like “50 groceries” or “what's overdue?”.
addExpensePrompt: Send the amount and what it's for — e.g. “50 groceries” or “120 water bill”.
payPickTitle: Which bill did you pay? Tap it:

usage.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number.
